body: Thanks for the follow-up, [Elena](people/elena-rossi) — really appreciated your thoughts on the carbon capture stack we were discussing. I've been doing more digging on the infrastructure layer and I think there's a genuinely interesting co-investment angle here if the founders are open to splitting the round. At [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) we've been leaning hard into deals where the climate and compute angles intersect, so this one hits both boxes in a way I don't see that often at seed. Would love to get on a call this week to align on terms before we go back to the team — are you free Thursday afternoon or Friday morning?
